Important Faucet Information

You will receive 100 SIDE tokens.
Please be aware that SIDE tokens are not real assets.
The testnet tokens provided by this faucet do not represent real funds. This service is exclusively intended for testnet users who require tokens for testing purposes.
To maintain fair distribution and due to our limited resources, requests for tokens from each network are limited to once a day.
We appreciate your understanding and cooperation.
